nodes.name: Expand Stripe Line Items
nodes.notes: Auth header: 'Authorization: Bearer <STRIPE_SECRET>' via a saved n8n httpHeaderAuth credential.

nodes.name: IS · Tag contact (strmanuals)
nodes.notes: Method name (AddTag) is a placeholder — confirm with infrastructure/influencersoft/verify-tag-and-sequence-methods.sh

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rpsKey: $env.INFLUENCERSOFT_API_KEY, email: $json.email, sequence: 'strmanuals-order-confirmation', merge_vars: { first_name: $json.first_name, manual_sku: $json.sku, manual_title: $json.manual_title, download_url: $json.download_url, bundle_urls: $json.bundle_urls.join('\n'), companion_name: $json.companion_name, companion_url: $json.companion_url, order_id: $json.order_id, next_manual_title: $json.next_manual_title, next_manual_url: $json.next_manual_url, is_bundle: $json.is_bundle } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ received: true, ignored: 'not a strmanuals event' }) }}
